implementation_summary: R006 Health Circuit Integration completed following Plan B (safety net approach). TradingEngine now includes HealthMonitor, CircuitBreaker, and DegradationCenter as upper-layer safety nets without modifying existing RiskOfficer core logic.
integration_points_ruling: 5 integration points implemented: 1) __init__ instances, 2) run_loop health check, 3) run_loop circuit breaker check, 4) _manage_positions trade result recording, 5) get_state exposure
halt_authority_ruling: Precedence: DegradationCenter (infrastructure) > CircuitBreaker (loss-based) > RiskOfficer (trading logic). Any level halt stops trading.
duplicate_state_resolution_ruling: RiskOfficer retains daily_pnl and consecutive_loss tracking. CircuitBreaker tracks independently. Double tracking is intentional fail-closed safety.
degradation_trigger_ruling: HealthMonitor aggregate status 'critical' triggers DegradationCenter.evaluate_and_degrade() with PAUSE_TRADING strategy. Health restored triggers restore().
test_coverage_ruling: 15 tests: 12 integration tests + 3 run_loop hook verification tests. All 15 PASS. R011 regression tests: 10/10 PASS.
